craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Hampton Court 1325 W. 75th Court Terrace, Apt. B, Indianapolis, IN, 46260 Want more information on this unit? See link (below): https://glick.aptdetails.com/73687s Call Now - show contact info x 148 OR Text 148 to show contact info for more information. Welcome to Hampton Court Apartments of Indianapolis 1 Bedroom, 1 Bath | Approximately 426 Sq. Ft. Community Info: Discover comfortable living at Hampton Court Apartments. Our pet-friendly community offers one and two bedroom apartments perfect for any lifestyle. Surrounded by beautifully landscaped grounds, residents can enjoy amenities including a scenic courtyard with a lake, a convenient laundry facility, covered parking, and more. Ideally located near St. Vincent Hospital, I-465, and the 86th Street shopping corridor, Hampton Court provides easy access to work, shopping, dining, and entertainment.   Unit Highlights ✧  Central AC ✧  Wood Style Flooring [ 1 ] ✧  Tech Ready ✧  Balcony or Patio [ 1 ] ✧  Tour Today ✧  Window Coverings ✧  Equipped Kitchens 1. Only available in select apartments Community Highlights ✧  Courtyard with Lake ✧  A Must See ✧  Service Coordinator ✧  Laundry room in each entry ✧  Covered parking ✧  Public Transportation Nearby ✧  Pet Friendly ✧  On-Site Maintenance & Management Office Hours Monday-Thursday: 9:00AM-5:00PM Friday: 9:00AM-12:00PM Pet Policy Pet Deposit: $250 (refundable) for 1st pet, $100 (nonrefundable) for 2nd Monthly Pet Fee: $25 per pet Max 2 pets per apartment home Breed Restrictions Apply* Equal Housing Opportunity fHMBmWC8
